## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why:

-

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (incorrect normalization, crash, wrong output)
- [ ] New lexicon entries / data update
- [ ] New feature (pipeline rule, API endpoint, CLI flag)
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation / examples
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] All existing tests pass locally (`pytest -v`)
- [ ] New tests added for any new behavior (if applicable)
- [ ] Benchmark has not regressed (`python -m openhinglish.eval.run_bench` — paste score below if data changed)
- [ ] If lexicon / data files were modified: data provenance is noted in the commit message or a comment (source URL, corpus name, license)
- [ ] Follows the coding style and structure described in `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] No private / personally identifiable data introduced into lexicon or test fixtures

|--------|--------|-------|
| accuracy | | |
| coverage | | |
